content: By now you have seen roots change shape.
SPEC to SPIC. FRACT to FRAG.
In Tier 3, the root does more work.
It carries ideas, not just actions.
PLIC means fold. Explicit = unfolded,
laid open. Implicit = folded in, hidden
inside.
FID means faith. Confident = full of
trust. Perfidious = faith destroyed.
The words are more abstract now. The
decompositions are richer. Trust the
method. It still works.
You may have noticed that English often
has two words for the same thing.
One plain, one formal.
begin     / commence
freedom   / liberty
ask       / inquire
buy       / purchase
withstand / endure
The plain words are Germanic. They have
been in English for over a thousand
years.
The formal words came from Latin,
through French, after 1066.
You are learning the Latin layer now.
